title: Born to rage in the USA: Bruce Springsteen’s lifelong protest in song — from Vietnam to Trump
description: The Boss has kicked off his current US tour with a string of fiery broadsides against President Trump, but this is far from the first time he’s weighed in on political issues. Kevin E G Perry looks back at Springsteen’s long history of outspoken advocacy
content:

de: Geboren, um in den USA zu toben: Bruce Springsteens lebenslanger Protest in Liedern – von Vietnam bis Trump. Der Boss hat seine aktuelle US-Tournee mit einer Reihe heftiger Seitenhiebe gegen Präsident Trump begonnen, aber dies ist bei weitem nicht das erste Mal, dass er sich zu politischen Themen äußert. Kevin E. G. Perry blickt auf Springsteens lange Geschichte offener Fürsprache zurück
en: Born to rage in the USA: Bruce Springsteen’s lifelong protest in song — from Vietnam to Trump. The Boss has kicked off his current US tour with a string of fiery broadsides against President Trump, but this is far from the first time he’s weighed in on political issues. Kevin E G Perry looks back at Springsteen’s long history of outspoken advocacy
la: Natus saevire in USA: recusatio vitae Brus Springsteen in cantu - a Vietnam ad Trump. title: Flin Flon snow lodge shuts down for spring, will return next winter
description: Flin Flon's snow lodge is gone for the season, but those responsible for building the structure are calling it a red-hot success. The ice-and-snow building was knocked down this week after crowds came from near and far to see it.
content:
Flin Flon's snow lodge is gone for the season, but those responsible for building the structure are calling it a red-hot success.
The ice-and-snow building, inspired by the famed Icehotel in norther… [+4028 chars]
de: Die Flin Flon-Schneehütte wird im Frühjahr geschlossen und wird im nächsten Winter zurückkehren. Flin Flons Schneehütte steht für diese Saison nicht mehr zur Verfügung, aber die Verantwortlichen für den Bau sprechen von einem glühenden Erfolg. Das aus Eis und Schnee bestehende Gebäude wurde diese Woche abgerissen, nachdem Menschenmengen aus nah und fern angereist waren, um es zu besichtigen.
en: Flin Flon snow lodge shuts down for spring, will return next winter. Flin Flon's snow lodge is gone for the season, but those responsible for building the structure are calling it a red-hot success. The ice-and-snow building was knocked down this week after crowds came from near and far to see it.
la: Flin Flon nix tugurium claudit pro ver, altera bruma redibit. Nives delubra Flin Flon pro tempore profecta sunt, sed illi qui structurae structurae auctores eam candenti successu vocant. Glacies et nivis aedificium hac septimana addictum est postquam turbae e propinquo venerunt et procul videbant.
